falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 lows invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 78% similarity to bottom_2024_aug assumed that level holds as support, and its failure means the structure was not a bottom but a continuation pattern leading to lower prices

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Persistent extreme fear contradicts the HOLD signal's implication of stabilization; the blowoff score of 40 suggests partial capitulation already occurred, and renewed sustained panic means the market has not found equilibrium and the bottom call was premature

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield closes above 4.75% while S&P 500 simultaneously closes below 4400
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination of rising real rates with falling equities breaks the correlation structure of the August 2024 bottom, where yields peaked and then declined as stocks stabilized; it signals a liquidity-driven selloff rather than a sentiment washout, invalidating the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
